name: Happened at work, used AI for comp claim—employer retaliating in Houston?
description: Comp claim first, sue retaliation—AI won't protect but doesn't bar.[1]

mainEntity.name: Happened at work, used AI for comp claim—employer retaliating in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp claim first, sue retaliation—AI won't protect but doesn't bar.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Workers' comp exclusive; AI irrelevant unless fraud.[1] Texas no-fault comp; retaliation illegal.

**Key factors:**
- File DWC-1 timely.
- AI not privileged.
- Retaliation suit separate.

Report retaliation to TWC; comp lawyer. Avoid AI in claims.[1] Document everything.
